_comment: Positives describe validating/auditing skills; negatives lean on sibling capabilities (bundling, deployment, migration, skill-design) or are out of scope.
positive: Validate a skill against the specification
Audit my skill system for consistency
Validate individual skills against the specification
Run the Agent Skills specification validation
Audit the entire skill system for structural issues
negative: Bundle this skill into a zip archive
Convert a flat skill into the router pattern
Decide between standalone and router design
